description:
Your local AI meeting companion app complete with webcam background removal, branding, camera enhancements and more.


features
- Added a startup screen image on free plans.
improvements
- Improved the initial calibration logic.
- Unitialize components on logout to release system resources.
fixes
- Fixed a bug where background and logo conditions may not be correctly set on startup.
- Prevent infinite loop erroring when video backgrounds crash.
- Fixed an issue where the mixer may not load after logging in.
- Fixed an issue where backgrounds and logos could not always be set as default.
- Fixed invalid background image format error when uploading a GIF or video background.
- Prevent the free watermark position changing inadvertently when the camera resolution changes.
- Fixed an issue where the watermark may not hide after changing from a free to a paid Workspace.
- Fixed an issue with backgrounds not always showing after applying a blur.
